chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-2113 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A. No.8537/2018. For hearing of main case. 09-08-2023 Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri Assistant Advocate General. ***** Petitioner seeks an order that the respondents be directed to restrain construction being raised over the land of the petitioner and to restore peaceful possession of the land to him. We have perused the record. The petitioner is claiming on the basis of Form-VII. He is not even in possession of the suit land and construction is claimed to have been raised on government land. These intricate questions require evidence and hence could at best be resorted to from a Court of competent jurisdiction which probably be a civil court where evidence could be recorded. The petition as such is not maintainable in view of the above, the petitioner however may pursue his remedy available to him under the law in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
